scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @chillclaw/contracts && npm run build --workspace @chillclaw/daemon && npm run build --workspace @chillclaw/desktop-ui
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @chillclaw/contracts && npm run test --workspace @chillclaw/daemon && npm run test --workspace @chillclaw/desktop-ui
scripts.test:mac-native: swift test --package-path apps/shared/ChillClawKit && swift test --package-path apps/macos-native
scripts.dev:daemon: npm run build --workspace @chillclaw/contracts && npm run dev --workspace @chillclaw/daemon
scripts.dev:ui: npm run build --workspace @chillclaw/contracts && npm run dev --workspace @chillclaw/desktop-ui
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @chillclaw/contracts && npm run lint --workspace @chillclaw/daemon && npm run lint --workspace @chillclaw/desktop-ui
